title: Cheesy Lentil Bake
description: A hearty baked lentil dish made with red lentils, vegetables, cheese and breadcrumbs.
steps: Heat some oil in a large frying pan.
Add carrot and onion. Stir fry for 5–10 minutes.
Stir in red lentils and add a little hot stock. Bring to boil.
Once absorbed add more stock. Continue adding in stages, stirring so it does not stick. Cook lentils for about 20 minutes.
Add cheese and breadcrumbs. Stir until cheese is melted.
Line an ovenproof dish with baking paper.
Place mixture in dish and press down.
Leave to cool and firm up before serving.
